title: NoIronGolemDrop
description: NoIronGolemDrop disables all Iron Golem drops, preventing iron ingots and poppies from being farmed and restoring balanced progression.
body:
# 🛑 NoIronGolemDrop - Mod
Iron farms too powerful? Stop infinite iron at the source.

NoIronGolemDrop removes all drops from Iron Golems, preventing them from dropping iron ingots and poppies.
This simple change shuts down iron farming exploits and restores balance to survival and progression-focused modpacks.

Whether Iron Golems spawn naturally in villages or are farmed by players, defeating them will no longer generate free resources.
![noirongolemdrop-banner1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7cc46d51c24c49663bb8d1f8447d8adbedb1d214_0.webp)

## 🔻 What it does 
- 🚫 Removes iron ingot drops from Iron Golems
- 🌺 Removes poppy drops from Iron Golems
- 🏗️ Affects both naturally spawned and player-created Iron Golems
- ⚙️ Lightweight and fully server-side

## 💡 Perfect for players who want:
- A more balanced survival or hardcore experience
- To disable iron farms without complex datapacks
- More meaningful progression and resource management
- Cleaner modpack balance for tech- or progression-driven packs

## 🧩 Compatibility:
- Works seamlessly with vanilla and modded village mechanics
- Compatible with most mob, AI, and structure mods
- Does not modify loot tables beyond Iron Golems

## 📦 Simple. Focused. Effective.
Because iron should be earned, not farmed endlessly.

![license_banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fcb02ac17ea39fe83ef86a51c0ab0681e7cec489.webp)
